summary: Investigated and fixed /mira-demo page crash. Root cause: 6.8MB JavaScript bundle + direct imports of 9000+ line components (MiraDemoPage 3447 lines + MiraDemoBackupPage 5789 lines). Applied lazy loading fix, but crashes may persist due to Service Worker caching old bundle.

critical.issue: Page crashes browser tab when loaded directly via URL due to 6.8MB bundle size
critical.root_cause: MiraDemoPage.jsx (3447 lines) + MiraDemoBackupPage.jsx (5789 lines) were directly imported instead of lazy loaded, causing memory pressure during JS parsing

integration_issues.issue: Service Worker (tdc-pwa-v2) caches old bundle, causing crashes even after fix is deployed

fix_applied.change: Changed MiraDemoPage, MiraDemoOriginalPage, and MiraDemoBackupPage from direct imports to lazy() imports
fix_applied.before: import MiraDemoPage from './pages/MiraDemoPage'; import MiraDemoOriginalPage from './pages/MiraDemoOriginalPage'; import MiraDemoBackupPage from './pages/MiraDemoBackupPage';
fix_applied.after: const MiraDemoPage = lazy(() => import('./pages/MiraDemoPage')); const MiraDemoOriginalPage = lazy(() => import('./pages/MiraDemoOriginalPage')); const MiraDemoBackupPage = lazy(() => import('./pages/MiraDemoBackupPage'));

additional_fix.change: Incremented cache version from v2 to v3 to force old cache invalidation

test_results.login_page_via_navigation: PASS - Works when navigated from homepage
test_results.login_page_direct: INTERMITTENT - May crash due to cached bundle
test_results.mira_demo_direct: FAIL - Crashes due to cached 6.8MB bundle

action_items: CRITICAL: Users need to clear browser cache/Service Worker to get the fix
Consider splitting MiraDemoPage.jsx (3447 lines) into smaller chunks
Consider removing MiraDemoBackupPage.jsx (5789 lines) as it's a backup file not used in production
Consider implementing code splitting for Mira hooks and utilities
Bundle size (6.8MB) is too large - needs optimization
Add cache-busting to Service Worker or implement proper versioning
critical_code_review_comments: MiraDemoPage.jsx at 3447 lines should be split into smaller modules
MiraDemoBackupPage.jsx at 5789 lines is even larger and should be removed from production bundle
Total source code is 216,225 lines - extremely large codebase causing bundle bloat
DoggyServiceDesk.jsx at 6037 lines and Admin.jsx at 5435 lines also contribute to bundle size

success_rate.frontend: 60% - Pages work via navigation, but direct URL access crashes

context_for_next_testing_agent: The lazy loading fix has been applied but Service Worker caching causes intermittent crashes. Test by: 1) Clear browser cache, 2) Navigate from homepage to /login then to /mira-demo (should work), 3) Direct URL load may still crash until SW cache is cleared. Bundle size of 6.8MB is the underlying issue.

rca_of_the_issue.symptom: Browser tab crashes with 'Target crashed' error when accessing /mira-demo, /mira-demo-original, or /login directly via URL
rca_of_the_issue.root_cause: MiraDemoPage.jsx (3447 lines, ~142KB source) and MiraDemoBackupPage.jsx (5789 lines, ~220KB source) were directly imported instead of lazy loaded, causing the entire 6.8MB JavaScript bundle to be parsed on initial page load, which exceeds browser memory limits
reproduction_steps: 2. Browser tab crashes before React renders
3. Console shows only 'Download React DevTools' and 'PWA: Service worker registered' before crash
mitigation_applied: Changed direct imports to lazy() imports in App.js
Incremented Service Worker cache version to force old cache invalidation
remaining_issues: Service Worker may still serve cached old bundle to returning users
Bundle size (6.8MB) is still too large and needs code splitting
